verse_text: Now Jacob called his sons and said, 'Gather together, that I may tell you what shall befall you in the last days:

pericope.title: Jacob's Final Words to His Sons

links.context: **49:1** — [[GEN.49:1]], [[GEN.49:2]], [[GEN.49:8]]–12: This passage is read during Saturday Vespers in the sixth week of Great Lent.

symbolic.title: Example: The Cherubim of Ezekiel I
